title: Data imported from Excel (CSV) truncates into multiple columns even though it is one column in Excel
excerpt: I want to import data that I exported from another program into a CSV file, then examined in Excel.  In Excel the data displays correctly–I only need one column.   But when I import to a new board in Monday, it truncates…

posts.author: Kurt (Kurt Harper)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to import data that I exported from another program into a CSV file, then examined in Excel. In Excel the data displays correctly–I only need one column. But when I import to a new board in Monday, it truncates into mulitple columns. Interestingly, I already have a board I created from an import of similar data from the same program, same process, that worked correctly. How do I prevent the truncation?
